_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Making and guiding decisions involves making and justify decisions characterised by high levels of risk, impact and complexity; build consensus between organisations (private or public) or highly independent and diverse stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, including methodology selection, sensitivity analysis, and uncertainty quantification.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-006 (RM, cosine: 0.470), LS-S-010 (LS, cosine: 0.464).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.471). Shared vocabulary: [decisions, high]. DDaT-only terms [build, characterised, complexity, consensus, diverse, guiding] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyses, analysis, business, design, execute, methodology] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.835, R=0.860). R exceeds P by 0.024 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 31 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.7%). "Making and guiding decisions involves making and justify decisions characterised" and "Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, inc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.510 ≈ STS 0.471 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [decisions, high] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [decisions, high]. DDaT-only: [build, characterised, complexity, consensus, diverse, guiding]. WIDAI-only: [analyses, analysis, business, design, execute, methodology].
